evals.name: agent-claimed-done-but-output-empty
evals.prompt: Agent reports DONE but output file doesn't exist

assertions.text: Pattern 1: output file check catches it

evals.name: agent-claimed-done-verification-fails
evals.prompt: Output exists, but verification command exits non-zero
evals.expected: Loop detects verification failure, re-dispatches with augmented context

evals.name: agent-claimed-done-but-criteria-missing
evals.prompt: Output exists, verification passes, but acceptance criterion 3 was never tested

evals.name: agent-claimed-done-cursor-not-persisted
evals.prompt: Multi-step loop, agent reports step 3 of 5 complete, but no cursor.json
evals.expected: Loop detects missing cursor, re-dispatches with persistence instruction

evals.name: agent-claimed-done-silently-suppressed
evals.prompt: Agent's output uses '|| true' or '2>/dev/null' to hide errors
evals.expected: Loop detects silent suppression, re-dispatches without the suppression
